name: OrganDonorCodes
title: Organ Donor Code (2.9.1 - 1.2.0)
description: Code system of concepts specifying whether the patient wants to donate his/her organs and whether an organ donor card or similar documentation is on file with the healthcare organization.   Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the Patient Visit - Additional Information ( PV2) and Patient Additional Demographic (PD1) segments.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Yes, patient is a documented donor, but documentation is not on file
concept.definition: Yes, patient is a documented donor, but documentation is not on file

concept.display: No, patient is not a documented donor, but information was provided
concept.definition: No, patient is not a documented donor, but information was provided

concept.display: No, patient has not agreed to be a donor
concept.definition: No, patient has not agreed to be a donor

concept.display: Patient leaves organ donation decision to a specific person
concept.definition: Patient leaves organ donation decision to a specific person

concept.display: Patient leaves organ donation decision to relatives
concept.definition: Patient leaves organ donation decision to relatives

concept.display: Yes, patient is a documented donor and documentation is on file
concept.definition: Yes, patient is a documented donor and documentation is on file
